skipped_tests.name: test_p0_listTables
skipped_tests.reason: QA_TENANT_SMOKE_PASSWORD not set — cannot run authenticated tests

environment_issues.description: QA_TENANT_SMOKE_PASSWORD environment variable is not set. All P0 tests require authentication as qa-smoke@inovaide-qa.com. 1Password CLI is installed (v2.32.0) but no accounts are configured.
environment_issues.root_cause: 1Password CLI authentication not configured. Desktop app integration is required or manual account setup needed.
environment_issues.unblock_action: Configure 1Password CLI: enable desktop app integration (https://developer.1password.com/docs/cli/app-integration/) or manually add account with 'op account add'

notes: All P0 smoke tests skipped due to missing QA_TENANT_SMOKE_PASSWORD. This is an env_problem blocker, not a code_bug. No tickets filed. Degradation rule not triggered (0 failures). To unblock: configure 1Password CLI authentication and retrieve password for qa-smoke@inovaide-qa.com from 1Password vault, then re-run tests.
